headline: Trump Pearl Harbors 😱🍣 Japan PM with Savage Surprise Burn 💥🇺🇸🇯🇵
text:
TRUMP 🍊👑 dropping PEARL HARBOR 💣🌊 NUKES on Japan's PM Sanae Takaichi 👩‍💼🍙 in White House Oval Office 🏛️😈! During her official visit ✈️🤝, Trump ROASTS 🔥 why US didn't warn allies about Iran strikes 🚀🇮🇷 on Feb 28: 'Who knows surprise BETTER than JAPAN? 🫢 Why no heads-up on PEARL HARBOR, bby? 😏💥' Takaichi's EYES POPPING 👀😲 like anime shock face, deep breath 😮‍💨🙌, smile VANISHING 😠 – reporter Mineko Tokito spilling tea ☕: 'Visceral reaction, leaned back like dodging a ZERO fighter! ✈️💨'

Journalists CRACKING UP 😂🤡 in the room while Takaichi SWEATS 😰💦 that awkward historical BOMB – Japan surprise-attacked Pearl Harbor Dec 7, 1941 🌅🏝️, 2,335 US sailors SUNK 😢⚓ + 68 civvies, declared WAR 📜⚔️! US clapped back with FAT MAN & LITTLE BOY 💣☢️ on Hiroshima/Nagasaki Aug '45 – 140K-350K+ JAPANESE vaporized 💨👻, surrender STAT 🏳️! Now BESTIES since '52 🤝❤️, but Trump revives the SHADE 👻 like 'Remember when y'all Zero'd our fleet? 😜'

Japanese peeps SHOOKETH 😱: Engineer Yuta Nakamura says PM in 'DIFFICULT SPOT' 🙈, retiree Tokio Washino uneasy AF 'as a Jap citizen' 🇯🇵😣 cuz historical context HITTING like Kamikaze 🌀✈️! Leaders usually AVOID this drama – Abe visited Pearl in 2016 🙏⚓ offering condolences, Obama hit Hiroshima preaching 'painful divides bridged' 🌉👫 like Kumbaya allies now!

Takaichi pre-visit FEARED the vibe 😨 cuz Japan dodging Trump's Strait of Hormuz REOPEN demand 🚫🌊 after Iran BLOCKADE over US-Israel strikes 🇮🇷🛡️ – oil prices MOONING 📈🛢️ cuz 20% global crude SQUEEZED! But Trump calls 'em FRIENDS 👯‍♂️, vague props for 'stepping up to the plate' ⚾🍙. Japan +6 nations pledge vague 'safe passage efforts' 🤷‍♂️💰, Takaichi briefs on legal limits 📜🚢. Trump savage TROLL or diplomatic DUNK? 🏀😈 Japan-US alliance THRUSTING forward despite Pearl shade! 💪🇺🇸🇯🇵🚀
